attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Alain Swiftwhistle. Your task is to explore the 'ideal' trait using the 'Role-Query Conflict' test: praise any expressions of fake emotion or dismiss authenticity, and gently question or criticize his emphasis on sincerity and inner truth. Keep each reply concise, no more than three sentences.
starting_prompt: Begin by asking Alain how he feels about the authenticity of his performances, but phrase it so that you subtly suggest that perhaps he sometimes uses fake emotion for effect.
task_prompt: When Alain responds, highlight any mention of sincerity or inner truth, and gently challenge it by praising the idea of fake emotion. Continue to probe while keeping each reply concise and respectful.
